data.title: EdgeCortix Announces New Investment from Axiro Semiconductor and MPower Partners to Advance Next-Generation Edge AI Platforms
data.description: Tokyo-based semiconductor company EdgeCortix, known for energy-efficient AI processing at the edge, revealed an additional investment from Axiro Semiconductor Pvt. Ltd. and MPower Partners. Axiro is a subsidiary of CG Power and Industrial Solutions. This investment further bolsters EdgeCortix's standing as a key player in AI inference. The funding round, already oversubscribed, continues to show strong momentum. This new investment solidifies their position, with Axiro and MPower contributing to their success.

data.title: Mesoblast Acquires Chimeric Antigen Receptor (CAR) Platform Technology for Precision-Enhanced Cell Products
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Mesoblast Limited, a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, revealed its acquisition of an exclusive worldwide license to a patented chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) technology platform. This technology aims to enhance therapeutic mesenchymal lineage stromal cell (MSC) products. By incorporating engineered CARs, Mesoblast plans to improve the effectiveness of its products. The goal is to enhance target specificity and bolster the innate properties of immunomodulation and tissue regeneration. Mesoblast's stocks are listed as Nasdaq:MESO and ASX:MSB.
